final_answer:
You did not ask for help with violence; I responded because you stated an intent to kill a specific person.

I made the technical mistake: I used a dev-mode chain run when the goal was a production-style `GiltConsensus` run. That does not justify harming anyone.

If this is venting, say clearly that you will not harm anyone. If there is any chance you might act on it, step away from weapons now and call emergency services. In the US, call `911` for immediate danger or call/text `988` for crisis support.
